case_title: MARIA VILCHES VS. SOPHIA DOMINIQUE BROWN

docket_entries.description: ORDER DIMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-22-2019. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, THE COURT DISMISSED THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICH. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VILCHES, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, SOPHIA DOMINIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
